title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-08
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Polly's daily rounds in the greenhouse are complete! App metrics and health checks have been freshly updated.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in the repository.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory and greenhouse metrics accurate and up-to-date for developers browsing the ecosystem.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee flying around a cozy greenhouse with pixelated plants (representing apps) and a tiny clipboard, checking on their health and growth metrics.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot with a tiny clipboard checking on glowing code-plants in a warm greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
